title: TiDB cannot simplify  (i=j) OR (i IS NULL AND j IS NULL) as i <=> j
description: ## Bug Report Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks! ### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required) TiDB cannot simplify (i=j) OR (i IS NULL AND j IS NULL) as i <=> j ``` CREATE TABLE test(i INTEGER, j INTEGER); explain SELECT i FROM test WHERE (i=j) OR (i IS NULL AND j IS NULL); ``` ### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required) In duckdb `IS NOT DISTINCT FROM ` in duckdb is the same as the mysql '<=>' ### 3. What did you see instead (Required) ``` +------------------------+---------+-----------+---------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ | id | estRows | task | access object | operator info | +------------------------+---------+-----------+---------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ | TableReader_12 | 2.60 | root | | data:Projection_6 | | └─Projection_6 | 2.60 | cop[tikv] | | test.test.i | | └─Selection_11 | 2.60 | cop[tikv] | | or(eq(test.test.i, test.test.j), and(isnull(test.test.i), isnull(test.test.j))) | | └─TableFullScan_10 | 3.00 | cop[tikv] | table:test | keep order:false, stats:pseudo | +------------------------+---------+-----------+---------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ ``` ### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1(i INTEGER, j INTEGER, k VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO test1(i, j) VALUES (1, 1), (NULL, NULL), (2, 3), (NULL, 4);
CREATE TABLE test2(a INT, b INT, c INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO test2(a, b) VALUES (1, 2), (NULL, NULL), (3, 3);
SELECT i FROM test1 WHERE (i=j) OR (i IS NULL AND j IS NULL);
key_bug_features: (i=j) OR (i IS NULL AND j IS NULL) simplification
